creator: seth@freebie.dp.ny.frb.org
text:
Ports updated 1/1/2000 looks for openssh-1.2.1.  The srctarball isn't there.

Fix: 

Please make the sources current.  Those of us who can't use cvs but want to
  use ports are stuck running a vulnerable version of OpenSSH until it's
  resolved.
How-To-Repeat: 
  cd /usr/ports/security/openssh && make fetchsrctarball
